Of Which: Foreign Non-Official	99991	2020-02	2961138	n.a.	2529764	n.a.	n.a.	431374	n.a.
Of Which: Foreign Non-Official	99991	2020-01	2857438	n.a.	2446509	n.a.	n.a.	410929	n.a.
									
Notes:									
1/ Data collected by Treasury International Capital (TIC) system.  Long-term Treasury bonds and notes are reported on the TIC Form SLT. Short-term Treasury									
   bill holdings are reported on the TIC form BL-2.									
									
2/ Short-term Treasury bill net transactions are estimated as the month-over-month change in position, with zero estimated valuation change.									
									
The data in this table are collected primarily from U.S.-based custodians. Since U.S. securities held in overseas custody accounts may not be									
attributed to the actual owners, the data may not provide a precise accounting of individual country ownership of Treasury securities (see									
TIC FAQ #7 at: http://www.treasury.gov/resource-center/data-chart-center/tic/Pages/ticfaq1.aspx).									
									
Column definitions:									
for_treas_pos: 1 + 5 + for_st_treas_pos									
for_treas_net: 3 + 7 - 2 - 6 + for_st_treas_net									
for_lt_treas_pos: 1 + 5									
for_lt_treas_net: 3 + 7 - 2 - 6									
for_lt_treas_valchg: 4 + 8									
for_st_treas_pos: TIC BL2 1 + 4 + 7									
for_st_treas_net: current minus prior month of for_st_treas_pos
